title: Build UI: / (HUD) and /record pages
description: Build the React UI for the HUD (home page) displaying current mode, mic level, model status, and the /record page for long-form recording with transcript display and file rotation status. Use TanStack Router for navigation.

title: Unit tests: audio capture and silence detection
description: Test cpal audio capture initialization, device enumeration, resampling to 16kHz mono, RMS silence detection with configurable threshold, buffer management for long sessions, and VAD-lite behavior for toggle mode auto-stop

title: Bootstrap Tauri v2 app with React + TanStack Router
close_reason: Implementation complete: Tauri v2 app bootstrapped with React + TanStack Router, prefs.rs, main.rs, db.rs (SQLite + FTS5), and keys.rs (hotkey detection) all implemented.

title: Implement Rust: keys.rs for hotkey detection
close_reason: Implementation complete: Tauri v2 app bootstrapped with React + TanStack Router, prefs.rs, main.rs, db.rs (SQLite + FTS5), and keys.rs (hotkey detection) all implemented.

title: Unit tests: security and permissions handling
description: Test microphone permission prompt and detection, accessibility permission detection for typing, mute in password fields heuristic, tray global disable toggle, and graceful degradation when permissions denied

title: Unit tests: database CRUD and FTS5 queries
description: Test session creation, entry insertion, retrieval by session_id, FTS5 full-text search, timestamps, word/char counts, migration applied on startup

title: Unit tests: text post-processing and voice commands
description: Test text normalization (whitespace, punctuation), voice command mapping (newline, tab, punctuation, quotes, code blocks), and edge cases (empty input, special characters)

title: Integration tests: end-to-end PTT workflow
description: Test full hold-to-talk workflow: hotkey press → audio capture → whisper transcription → voice command mapping → keystroke output → DB persistence. Test toggle mode: start → capture → 3s silence auto-stop → type. Verify no stray modifiers in typed text

title: Build UI: /settings page
close_reason: Built /settings page with all preference settings: activation, model, typing, voice commands, and recording

title: Unit tests: hotkey detection (L/R modifiers)
description: Test left/right modifier detection, hold mode state machine (start on both down, stop on release), toggle mode chord detection, debounce logic, release-before-type guard verification, and modifier-only activation

title: Implement Rust: prefs.rs and main.rs
close_reason: Implementation complete: Tauri v2 app bootstrapped with React + TanStack Router, prefs.rs, main.rs, db.rs (SQLite + FTS5), and keys.rs (hotkey detection) all implemented.

title: Unit tests: record mode chunking and rotation
description: Test long-form recording creates sessions with mode='record', chunks audio every 60s, auto-rotates on maxHours (8) or maxFileGB (4), creates new session/file on rotation, writes to rolling .txt file, no typing to apps during record mode

title: Unit tests: React UI components
description: Test HUD displays current mode/mic level/model, Settings form validation and persistence, Logs table sorting/filtering/pagination, Record page transcript display and file rotation status, and route navigation

title: Manual QA: hotkeys, hold/toggle, voice commands, record mode
description: Manual testing: (1) Both L/R Cmd+Opt combos work, release-before-type guard, (2) Hold mode capture→transcribe→type without stray modifiers, (3) Toggle 3.0s silence auto-stop with adjustable threshold, (4) Voice commands map to keys/punctuation, (5) Logs searchable with export, (6) Record mode hours-long session rotates cleanly, (7) No socket opens / CSP blocks connections, (8) Mic + Accessibility prompts appear

title: Implement Rust: db.rs with SQLite and FTS5
close_reason: Implementation complete: Tauri v2 app bootstrapped with React + TanStack Router, prefs.rs, main.rs, db.rs (SQLite + FTS5), and keys.rs (hotkey detection) all implemented.

title: Unit tests: preferences load/save/validation
description: Test config loading from JSON, saving, validation of hotkeys, silence thresholds, model profiles, typing options, voice commands enabled/map, record settings

title: Implement Rust: stt.rs whisper integration
close_reason: Implemented whisper-rs integration in stt.rs module with model loading, transcription, and voice commands

title: Unit tests: typing output and clipboard fallback
description: Test enigo keystroke synthesis, modifier release guard, throttle per char, clipboard fallback for secure fields, newline append option
close_reason: Implemented typing output module with enigo keystroke synthesis, modifier release guard, throttle per char, clipboard fallback for secure fields, and newline append option. Added unit tests for TypeOptions and TypeMethod configurations.

title: Write tests and perform QA
close_reason: Split into individual test tasks: stt-527, stt-atk, stt-51g, stt-ces, stt-8rv

title: Implement Rust: audio.rs for mic capture
description: Implement audio.rs for microphone capture using cpal. Handle device enumeration, initialization, resampling to 16kHz mono format for Whisper, RMS silence detection with configurable threshold, buffer management for long sessions, and support VAD-lite behavior for toggle mode auto-stop.

title: Write documentation
close_reason: Split into individual test tasks: stt-527, stt-atk, stt-51g, stt-ces, stt-8rv

title: Unit tests: model loading and SHA-256 verification
description: Test whisper model loading from path, SHA-256 file verification against known checksums, profile selection (small.en, multilingual-small, multilingual-medium), Metal fallback to CPU, context reuse across sessions, and missing/invalid model error handling

title: Build UI: /logs page
close_reason: Built /logs page with sessions list, entries display, search functionality, and export to text file

title: Implement Rust: typer.rs keystroke output
description: Implement typer.rs for keystroke output using rdev or enigo. Handle text typing, special keys (newline, tab), punctuation mapping, code block detection, mute in password fields heuristic, and ensure no stray modifiers in typed text.

title: Scaffold STT project with Tauri, React, and TanStack Router
close_reason: Scaffolded with Tauri, TanStack Router, Biome, and beads tracking

title: Unit tests: export functionality (txt/md)
description: Test .txt export with optional timestamps and session headers, .md export with session headings and code block mapping, voice command representation in exports, multi-entry selection, and file save dialog integration

title: Wire Tauri commands end-to-end
description: Wire Tauri commands end-to-end: connect the React UI to the Rust core by implementing commands for start/stop capture, transcribe audio, insert typed text, read/write preferences, database queries, and export file dialogs. This bridges the frontend with the audio capture, whisper transcription, keystroke output, and SQLite persistence layers.
